_meta.description: HONEST multi-resolver re-verification of the anci-oiv-resolver catalog domains for the v0.6 domain_status bake gate.
_meta.method: Pinned PUBLIC resolvers only (Cloudflare->Google->Quad9), OS/NextDNS leg SKIPPED, 0.0.0.0 null-route filtered, consensus, inconclusive!=phantom.

corroboration.rule: phantom REQUIRES corroboration: a live 2026-06-14 NXDOMAIN is baked phantom ONLY if the frozen 2026-05-26 verification_status was NOT live/mail_only. DIVERGENCE (frozen live/mail_only but current nxdomain) is baked unverified (NOT phantom) and flagged for manual catalog review. Positive recoveries stay resolving.
